---
title: "Teaching team"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Course template note
This repository is a forkable course template. If you are running this course at your institution, fork the repo and replace the placeholders below with your own team and contact info.

If you are a student in a specific offering, this page is finalised before week 1.
:::

## Instructor

*To be announced before week 1.* Role, affiliation, short bio, research interests, and contact will be posted here.

## Teaching assistants

*To be announced before week 1.* Names and contact will be posted here when assignments are confirmed.

## Guest contributors

*Added as guest sessions are scheduled.* Where possible, guest names will be posted at least one week before the relevant session.
